code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut evens: List<Int> = []
mut odds: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut has_digit = false
mut started = false

while i <= n
  let b = if i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      -1
    end
  else
    32
  end

  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

  if is_ws
    if has_digit
      let val = cur * sign
      if val % 2 == 0
        evens = list.push(evens, val)
      else
        odds = list.push(odds, val)
      end
    end
    cur = 0
    sign = 1
    has_digit = false
    started = false
  else if b == 45 and not started
    sign = -1
    started = true
  else if b == 43 and not started
    sign = 1
    started = true
  else
    let d = b - 48
    cur = cur * 10 + d
    has_digit = true
    started = true
  end

  i = i + 1
end

mut evens_str = "evens="
mut first_e = true
for v in evens
  if first_e
    evens_str = "#{evens_str}#{v}"
    first_e = false
  else
    evens_str = "#{evens_str} #{v}"
  end
end
print(evens_str)

mut odds_str = "odds="
mut first_o = true
for v in odds
  if first_o
    odds_str = "#{odds_str}#{v}"
    first_o = false
  else
    odds_str = "#{odds_str} #{v}"
  end
end
print(odds_str)
